channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: CSIS Names Thamar Harrigan Chief of Staff of the Economic Security and Technology Department
item.description: The Center for Strategic and International Studies today announced that Thamar Harrigan has joined the CSIS Economic Security and Technology (EST) Department as chief of staff and director of operations.

item.title: Using Minerals and Energy to Rebuild the U.S.-South Africa Relationship
item.description: Minerals have been the backbone of the U.S.–South Africa relationship for over a century. South Africa is a mineral production and processing powerhouse, but rising energy costs are pushing capacity to China. If it declines, U.S. dependence on China and Russia deepens.
